sharedStateObservations.description: The kernel-auditor skill's Steps 3-4 (Read Each File, Apply Bug Category Checklist) don't apply to verification-only gate features. The worker correctly skipped them but noted this gap. Adding a 'Special Cases' entry for gate/verification features (just run tests + build, skip audit steps) would prevent future workers from wasting time or feeling uncertain about skipping inapplicable steps.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker skillFeedback.suggestedChanges: "The kernel-auditor skill's Step 3 (Read Each File) and Step 4 (Bug Category Checklist) don't apply to verification-only gate features. A note about gate features being verification-only (skip audit steps, just run tests/build) would help future workers."

summary: Verification-only gate feature executed correctly. Worker ran the full test suite (965 passed, 0 failed, exceeding the >= 960 baseline) and confirmed a clean kernel release build. No code changes were made, which is correct for this feature's scope. The commit referenced (9d83ab7) is the latest on the branch from the prior bug fix feature.
